description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a goat-like sheep with a brown and white coat, standing on all four legs. The animal has a slender body, a slightly arched back, and a short, downward-pointing tail. Its head is adorned with two medium-sized, backward-curving horns and upright, pointed ears. The face is elongated, with a visible pink tongue protruding from its mouth, and the eyes are set on the sides of the head. The wool appears short and straight, with a patchy distribution of brown and white coloration, especially prominent on the flanks and underbelly. The legs are slim and sturdy, ending in cloven hooves, and the overall build suggests an agile, healthy animal suitable for an urban or rural environment.
description: A brown and white goat-like sheep with medium backward-curving horns, upright pointed ears, and a short, straight wool coat. The animal stands on all fours with a visible pink tongue and a patchy color pattern.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sheep's face, both horns, upright ears, and pink tongue protruding from its mouth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full body profile, the backward curve of the horns, and the patchy brown and white coat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the short, downward tail, the back of the horns, and the animal's hind legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the body profile, horn curvature, and the tongue extending from the mouth.
attribute_wool_pattern: The wool is short, straight, and appears patchy, with brown dominating the upper body and white patches on the underbelly and flanks. The texture is smooth and close to the skin, lacking curls or waves.
attribute_horn_presence: medium; two backward-curving, pointed horns extend from the top of the head.
attribute_ear_shape: The ears are upright, pointed, and moderately long, projecting outward from the sides of the head with a slight forward angle.
attribute_tail_position: The tail is short, straight, and points downward, visible from the rear and side views.
attribute_leg_posture: The legs are straight and sturdy, supporting the animal in a standing posture. All four legs are evenly spaced, indicating a stable, alert stance.
